processing.text: if @@admin <> 1 and @type = 1 begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'SalesPrice', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @r int select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end alter table @@table alter column ma_vt char(32) alter table @@table alter column ma_nt char(32) create index i on @@table (ma_vt, ngay_ban, ma_nt) if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join dmgia2 b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ngay_ban = b.ngay_ban and a.ma_nt = b.ma_nt select @field = 'ma_vt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vt not in (select ma_vt from dmvt)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nt not in (select ma_nt from dmnt)&Error; select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmgia2 b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ngay_ban = b.ngay_ban and a.ma_nt = b.ma_nt delete @@table from @@table a join #k b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ngay_ban = b.ngay_ban and a.ma_nt = b.ma_nt set @q = 'insert into dmgia2 (ma_vt, ngay_ban, ma_nt, gia_nt2, gia2, ma_gia, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2' set @q = @q + ', ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9)' set @q = @q + 'select ma_vt, ngay_ban, ma_nt, gia_nt2, 0, '''', getdate(), getdate(), rtrim(@@userID), rtrim(@@userID), ' set @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null from @@table' exec sp_executesql @q if @type = '1' begin update dmgia2 set gia_nt2 = b.gia_nt2, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID from dmgia2 a, #k b where a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ngay_ban = b.ngay_ban and a.ma_nt = b.ma_nt end
